description: Declares all framework scripts and global skills, plus their install targets. Read by install-tools.sh (and the aa-install-tools wrapper skill). Two top-level arrays: 'scripts' (shell-level helpers under ~/.claude/scripts/) and 'global_skills' (Claude Code skills under ~/.claude/skills/ available system-wide). Adding a new global skill is a manifest edit — no code change in install-tools.sh required.

scripts.name: aa-sonarqube/fetch-issues.sh
scripts.description: Fetch SonarQube issues for the current project. Requires SONARQUBE_URL and SONARQUBE_TOKEN environment variables.

scripts.name: aa-worktree/worktree.sh
scripts.description: Git worktree helpers (sourced into shell). Provides aa_g_worktree_init / _remove / _list / _switch / _conclude / _update / _main functions. The aa_ prefix differs from the upstream a_ prefix at github.com/mahsanamin/my_setup so the framework's copy can coexist with a developer's manual install without function-name collisions. Looks up its companion helpers via $AA_WORKTREE_DIR (defaults to ~/.claude/scripts/aa-worktree).

scripts.name: aa-worktree/aa_g_worktree_init
scripts.description: Companion helper sourced by worktree.sh's aa_g_worktree_init function. Creates a new worktree with auto-cd.

scripts.name: aa-worktree/aa_g_worktree_remove
scripts.description: Companion helper executed by worktree.sh's aa_g_worktree_remove function. Removes a worktree with merge verification and protected-branch safeguards.

scripts.name: aa-worktree/aa_g_worktree_review
scripts.description: Companion helper sourced by worktree.sh's aa_g_worktree_review function. Creates a review worktree from a GitHub PR or remote branch, with a 'review-' prefixed local branch.

scripts.name: aa-freshness/check.sh
scripts.description: Framework freshness + discovery check. Sourced from shell-rc and auto-runs once per terminal open (throttled to 24h via ~/.claude/.aa-last-freshness-check). Detects framework behind origin/main, pulled-but-not-installed state, and new global skills since last install. Self-contained — also executable directly via `bash check.sh [--force]` from any global skill's Phase 0 to surface the nudge mid-session.

global_skills.name: aa-optimizer
global_skills.description: AI rules optimizer — audits a project's rule files for redundancy, alwaysApply overuse, and stale references.

global_skills.name: aa-record-improvement
global_skills.description: Capture a framework improvement suggestion from inside a target project. Writes a structured file to the workspace's _AIAwarenessFramework/improvements/ for aa-add-improvement to consume.

global_skills.name: aa-global-pr-reviewer
global_skills.description: Review any GitHub PR from anywhere. Clones the target repo into ~/aa-global-pr-reviewer/repos/, creates a review worktree via aa_g_worktree_review, detects the project's existing rules and reviewers (CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / docs/ai-rules/ / .coderabbit.yaml / .github/workflows/), runs the project's tests (best-effort), reviews changed code with focus on logical bugs and edge cases not caught by other tools, dedups against existing PR comments, and posts inline review comments with fix suggestions.
